title: Fix load diagram interface and add text customization features

requirements.text: Fix the load diagram selection interface in LoadDiagramDialog.tsx to accurately display saved diagrams and ensure the correct diagram state loads when a user selects a diagram from the list
acceptanceCriteria: The load diagram dialog displays all saved diagrams with accurate metadata
When a user clicks on a diagram in the selection interface, the correct diagram state loads onto the canvas
All diagram elements (icons, connections, drawings, text labels) restore accurately from the saved state
The selection interface provides clear visual feedback when a diagram is selected

requirements.text: Add font size control to the text tool in AttackPathToolbar.tsx that allows users to select a font size before placing text labels on the canvas
acceptanceCriteria: A font size selector is visible in the toolbar when the text tool is active
Users can choose from predefined font sizes (e.g., 12, 14, 16, 18, 20, 24, 28, 32, 36, 48)
The selected font size applies to text labels when placed on the canvas
The font size control is intuitive and clearly labeled

requirements.text: Enable manual line breaks in text labels in AttackPathCanvas.tsx by allowing users to press Enter key to create new lines within text input
acceptanceCriteria: When entering text for a label, pressing Enter creates a new line instead of submitting the text
Multi-line text labels display correctly on the canvas with proper line spacing
Line breaks are preserved when saving and loading diagrams
The text input interface provides clear visual indication of multi-line support

requirements.text: Update the useAttackPathState hook to manage font size state for text labels and pass the selected font size to newly created text elements
acceptanceCriteria: The hook tracks the currently selected font size for the text tool
Newly placed text labels use the selected font size
Font size state persists while the text tool is active
The hook provides methods to update the font size selection

constraints: Do not modify the backend diagram storage structure
Maintain compatibility with existing saved diagrams
Do not alter the existing free transform tool functionality
Preserve all existing attack path visualizer features
nonGoals: Changing font family or other text styling options beyond size
Automatic text wrapping or word break functionality
Font size adjustment after text placement (separate from free transform)
Rich text formatting or text alignment controls
